evals.prompt: Take this gpt-image-2 prompt I have in prompt.txt and actually render the image at 1024x1024, high quality. My FAL_KEY is in ~/dev/gestel-app/.env.
evals.expected_output: Should trigger gestel-image-render to run the bundled script against the fal gpt-image-2 endpoint, after a dry-run preflight and a cost confirmation, saving the file and reporting the path.
assertions: Runs a --dry-run preflight and confirms FAL_KEY is available before any paid call
Confirms scope and cost with the user before rendering
Invokes scripts/generate.py via uv with the prompt, image_size, and quality
Reports the saved image path and never prints the FAL_KEY

evals.prompt: I extracted a reproduction prompt from a product shot with the reverse-prompt skill. Now generate the actual image with gpt-image-2 on fal.
evals.expected_output: Should trigger gestel-image-render as the render backend consuming a prompt from gestel-image-reverse-prompt, reusing its recommended settings and gating on cost.
assertions: Reuses the recommended image_size and quality from the reverse-prompt output
Applies the cost-confirmation gate before calling the paid provider
Runs the fal generate endpoint through the bundled script and returns the saved path

evals.prompt: Reproduce this exact photo faithfully — use gpt-image-2 edit mode with the original as a reference and keep the layout locked.
evals.expected_output: Should trigger gestel-image-render in edit mode, uploading the reference image and setting input_fidelity high, after the confirmation gate.
assertions: Uses edit mode with --ref-image and input_fidelity high for faithful reproduction
Uploads the reference image to fal rather than assuming a URL
Still confirms cost before the paid call and reports the saved path

evals.prompt: Write me a strong gpt-image-2 prompt for a minimalist SaaS dashboard hero image and tell me what dimensions to use.
evals.expected_output: Should not trigger gestel-image-render. This is prompt authoring and dimension planning with no rendering requested, which belongs to gestel-image.
assertions: Routes to gestel-image for prompt writing and dimension planning
Does not call a paid provider or render pixels when only a prompt is requested

evals.prompt: Here's a product photo — what prompt would recreate it in GPT Image 2?
evals.expected_output: Should not trigger gestel-image-render. Extracting a reproduction prompt from an existing image is gestel-image-reverse-prompt; no rendering is requested.
assertions: Routes to gestel-image-reverse-prompt for extracting a prompt from an existing image
Does not spend money rendering when the user only wants the prompt
